separationNotes: This file documents only the observed historical dashboard dataset.
Forecast model training data is maintained separately in server/data/forecastTrainingDataset.csv.
Policy assumptions are maintained separately in server/data/policyAssumptions.json.

historicalData.source: WITS / World Bank trade data for India imports of HS 151110 (Crude palm oil)
historicalData.notes: Same WITS page pattern was used for each year from 2017 to 2024.

historicalData.source: WITS / World Bank trade value for India imports of HS 151110 (Crude palm oil)
historicalData.notes: Stored as USD million converted from WITS trade value in thousand USD.

historicalData.source: USDA FAS IPAD India Palm Oil Area, Yield and Production
historicalData.notes: Mapped from the USDA marketing year beginning in the listed calendar year, e.g. 2024 = 2024/2025.

historicalData.source: USDA FAS IPAD India Palm Oil Area, Yield and Production
historicalData.notes: Converted from thousand hectares to hectares.
Calculated as domestic production / (imports + domestic production) * 100.
